case_title: S.F. EMPRESS HOTEL,LLC VS. MYRNA MAE FIELD et al

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day in Dept 218 with Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: V.Mack, Reporter: Patricia Van Steenberge CSR #1742

Arnold Evje, Esq., for Plaintiff S.F. Empress Hotel.
Janice Knight, Defendant in pro per.
Parties met in Dept 504B with Judge Pro Tem Steven MacDonald and reached a settlement by stipulation, but not read into the record. See scanned document.
